## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧪 Test update
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring
- [ ] 🎨 Style/formatting changes
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (ran `black`, `flake8`, `isort`)
- [ ] I've added/updated type hints
- [ ] I've added/updated docstrings
- [ ] I've updated the documentation (if needed)
- [ ] I've added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] I've updated CHANGELOG.md (under "Unreleased")
- [ ] My commits follow the conventional commits format
- [ ] I've reviewed my own code
